englishDefinitions: Unable to make progress or move forward in life, work, or a situation.
A phrase made famous by the theme song of the TV show “Friends.”
examples: I feel stuck in second gear at this job and need a new challenge.
The project is stuck in second gear because we still don't have approval.
The song says, “Your life's a joke, you're broke, your love life's D.O.A., and you're stuck in second gear.”
